holdings.infoBox: METV is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.10%, Roblox at 5.47%, Arm Holdings at 5.29%, 3iQ Solana Staking ETF at 4.87%, and 3iQ Ether Staking ETF at 4.71%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Ball Metaverse ETF (METV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Ball Metaverse index. The fund is a passively-managed ETF investing in globally-listed equities spanning various industries, all relating to what it defines as a future iteration of the internet. Stocks are selected by a committee and weighted in tiers. METV was launched on Jun 30, 2021 and is issued by Roundhill.
